description: As part of regular validation, a technician performs a test restore of a random server backup.

nodes.task_description: Select a random server and a recent backup point to test.

expected_outcome.expected: A target for the test restore is selected.

nodes.task_description: Restore the server as a new VM in an isolated test network.
Boot the restored VM and verify that it is functional by logging in.

expected_outcome.expected: The test is successful, proving the integrity of the backups. The test VM is then deleted.
